comment: Published cosmic number-count dipole measurements and reassessments; retrieval date 2026-07-03. TFPT expectation is NOT in this file -- it lives in the CLI (FLRW + tiny mu4/PSL(2,C) remnant).

cmb_kinematic.source: Planck CMB dipole: v = 369.8 km/s toward (l,b) = (264.02, 48.25)
cmb_kinematic.note: Ellis-Baldwin kinematic expectation D_kin = [2 + x(1+alpha)] beta for the CatWISE quasar sample (Secrest+2021 spectral/flux parameters)

legs.name: CatWISE2020 quasars (Secrest+2021)
legs.note: space-based IR selection; independent of radio catalogs

legs.name: CatWISE2020 Bayesian (Dam+2023)
legs.note: Bayesian evidence analysis of the same sample; direction consistent with CMB dipole; mask leakage quantified

legs.name: extended WISE catalog (Secrest+2022)
legs.note: extended selection; von Hausegger et al. 2026 infer a larger clustering dipole in this catalog

legs.name: MALS/radio kinematic decomposition (Wagenveld+2025)
legs.reference: Wagenveld et al. 2025, A&A (arXiv:2504.xxxx; aa53397-24): joint kinematic + residual fit
legs.note: joint fit across radio catalogs: best-fit residual (non-kinematic) dipole D_resid = (0.81 +- 0.14)e-2 at 5.4 sigma, aligned with the CMB dipole direction

legs.name: RMP colloquium status (Secrest, von Hausegger, Rameez, Mohayaee, Sarkar 2025)
legs.note: review-level claim: 'this discrepancy now exceeds 5 sigma'; partisan reading, listed as the optimistic pole of the spread

reassessments.name: FLASK reassessment S1 (no clustering dipole)
reassessments.reference: arXiv:2511.00822 (ApJ 2026): lognormal LSS + shot noise + exact mask
reassessments.note: D_obs = 15.54e-3 reproduced; S0 pipeline check reproduces 4.82 sigma

reassessments.name: FLASK reassessment S2 (random clustering dipole)
reassessments.note: Tiwari+2023 clustering dipole D_clus = 0.81e-3, random orientation

reassessments.name: FLASK reassessment S3 (aligned clustering dipole)
reassessments.note: clustering dipole aligned with CMB direction (most conservative physical scenario)

reassessments.name: octopole-marginalized reading (Abghari+2024)
reassessments.reference: Abghari et al. 2024 (JCAP); contested by Secrest et al. 2025
reassessments.note: mask-induced l=3 -> l=1 mode coupling could allow consistency with the CMB dipole; the required octopole amplitudes are disputed

deciders: LSST + Euclid + SKA/MALS number-count dipoles (independent selections, deeper flux limits); DESI QSO spectroscopic dipole; joint clustering-marginalized analyses
